rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ADA C. UNRUH FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Summary Judgment Of The Merits
rulings.Rulings: Objector Marjory Halligan's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED for the following reasons: (1) The Motion for Summary Judgment does not comply with the requirements of CCP § 436; (2) there is no pleading on file to be summarily adjudicated; (3) Ms. Halligan has no standing under Probate Code § 17200 to bring a motion concerning the internal affairs of this Trust; (4) this Court has previously ruled on the arguments raised in this pleading, and concluded that Ms. Halligan lacks standing in this matter and her claims are barred by the applicable statutes of limitations. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, August 16, 2017.
